task: Write a Python function that parses an AWS S3 bucket name from an S3 URI string like 's3://my-bucket/path/to/file.txt' and returns just the bucket name.
Create a JSON object that represents an AWS IAM policy allowing read-only access to a specific S3 bucket named 'company-data'.
Write a regex pattern that matches valid AWS EC2 instance IDs, which follow the format 'i-' followed by 8 or 17 hexadecimal characters.
